attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT, 
  'SERVICE_MAN_JV' DV_MEASURE_NAME,
  WI.BK_MEASURE_NAME               ,
  WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
  WI.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
  WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         ,
  WI.SRC_ENTITY_NAME               ,
  WI.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
  COALESCE(SO.BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
  WI.BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT        ,
  WI.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
  WI.RECOGNIZED_REV_USD_AMT        ,   
  WI.BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
  WI.PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT         ,
  WI.PROJECTED_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  'UNKNOWN' RECOGNIZE_OR_PROJECTED_TYPE_CD,
  WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
  WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
  WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
 CASE WHEN (BK_MEASURE_NAME IN ('BofA Net Down','Reconciliation Adjustment - XCAT') 
 OR (BK_MEASURE_NAME='Miscellaneous MBA' AND WI.BK_DEAL_ID='12718420'))  THEN 'Y' 
               ELSE CASE WHEN COALESCE(SO.XCAT_FLG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
                                    ELSE CASE WHEN NP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' 
				 ELSE CASE WHEN COALESCE(EL.XCAT_FLG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 					
                                                           ELSE 'N'
                                                END
                           END  END
  END XCAT_FLAG,
  
  COALESCE(OFFER.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') RECURRING_OFFER_FLG          ,
 COALESCE(OFFER.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others')   BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME          ,
  
  CASE  WHEN   XCAT_FLAG   = 'Y'  THEN 'Y' 
  ELSE COALESCE(OFFER.ELA_FLG,'N') END AS ELA_FLG,
  
  WI.DV_BEGINNING_BLNCE_REV_USD_AMT,
  WI.DV_BRIDGE_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
  WI.REMAINING_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
  WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  CAST (
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)) AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM  OFFER CARVE OUT CHANGE */
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_DEFREV_MANUAL_JV_SRVC_FLAT WI
     
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SO
      ON  SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY      
         
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON   WI.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY    
     
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OFFER
   ON  OFFER.PRODUCT_KEY = WI.PRODUCT_KEY    
   AND OFFER.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  = WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
   AND OFFER.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD  = WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_DFR_ALLOCATED_DATA EL
   ON WI.BK_DEAL_ID = EL.DEAL_ID

WHERE WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT  < 201801

SELECT 
  WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT, 
  'SERVICE_MAN_JV' DV_MEASURE_NAME,
  WI.BK_MEASURE_NAME               ,
  WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
  WI.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
  WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         ,
  WI.SRC_ENTITY_NAME               ,
  WI.BK_DEAL_ID                    ,
  COALESCE(SO.BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
  WI.BK_CCRM_PROFILE_ID_INT        ,
  WI.SERVICE_FLG                   ,
  WI.RECOGNIZED_REV_USD_AMT        ,   
  WI.BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
  WI.PROJECTED_REV_USD_AMT         ,
  WI.PROJECTED_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
  'UNKNOWN' RECOGNIZE_OR_PROJECTED_TYPE_CD,
  WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
  WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
  WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                ,
 CASE WHEN (BK_MEASURE_NAME IN ('BofA Net Down','Reconciliation Adjustment - XCAT') 
 OR (BK_MEASURE_NAME='Miscellaneous MBA' AND WI.BK_DEAL_ID='12718420'))  THEN 'Y' 
               ELSE CASE WHEN COALESCE(SO.XCAT_FLG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
                                    ELSE CASE WHEN NP.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' 
					ELSE CASE WHEN COALESCE(EL.XCAT_FLG,'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 				
                                                           ELSE 'N'
                                                END
                           END  END
  END XCAT_FLAG,
  
  COALESCE(OFFER.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,'N') RECURRING_OFFER_FLG          ,
    CASE WHEN NSO.CSCC_FLG = 'Y' AND OFFER_ENT.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' THEN ALLC_ENT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
              ELSE COALESCE(OFFER.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others') 
  END BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME          ,
  
  CASE  WHEN XCAT_FLAG   = 'Y' THEN 'Y' 
  WHEN NSO.CSCC_FLG = 'Y' AND OFFER_ENT.BK_PARENT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = 'Cisco One' THEN ALLC_ENT.ELA_FLG
  ELSE COALESCE(OFFER.ELA_FLG,'N') END AS ELA_FLG,
  
  WI.DV_BEGINNING_BLNCE_REV_USD_AMT,
  WI.DV_BRIDGE_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT ,
  WI.REMAINING_BALANCE_REV_USD_AMT,
  WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
  CAST (
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) || '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)) ||  '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)) ||  '~' || 
  TRIM(COALESCE(WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999))AS VARCHAR(70)) AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD /* ADDED AS PART OF Q3FY20 ICPM  OFFER CARVE OUT CHANGE */
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_DEFREV_MANUAL_JV_SRVC_FLAT WI
     
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SO
      ON  SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY      
         
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON   WI.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY    
     
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = WI.SALES_ORDER_KEY  
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION  ATTRIB
ON WI.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = ATTRIB.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
AND ATTRIB.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
AND ATTRIB.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY > 0
AND ATTRIB.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN (SELECT  ATTRIBUTION_CD FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_RO_OFFER_ATTRB_CODE)

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_RECURRING_OFFER_PRODUCT ALLC_ENT
 ON ATTRIB.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY = ALLC_ENT.ITEM_KEY  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_OFFER_TYPE  OFFER_ENT 
  ON OFFER_ENT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME = ALLC_ENT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OFFER
   ON  OFFER.PRODUCT_KEY = WI.PRODUCT_KEY    
   AND OFFER.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  = WI.DV_PRODUCT_KEY 
   AND OFFER.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD  = WI.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_DFR_ALLOCATED_DATA EL
   ON WI.BK_DEAL_ID = EL.DEAL_ID

WHERE WI.PROCESSED_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_INT  >=201801
